prompt:
An open mission logbook on a desk, showing a single page filled with small, tidy handwritten notes and a simple arc sketch representing an ISS horizon-to-horizon track. Nearby are binoculars, a compact stopwatch, and a small star chart, implying observational timing and brightness estimation without any readable text on the page.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future solarpunk lab aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, clean workspace materials, no brand logos, no readable text, no harsh overlays. Composition is uncluttered and icon-friendly, with the logbook page as the clear focal point.
